thread_title: What should i do next êith this acccount?

content:
Get a copy of Arachne if you can, yes. even if you're not using her in main story, she's such a strong and versatile support that you can make her work in a myriad of scenarios. Also she kinda destroys arc1 as a whole and won't be back for a while, since her release banner was fairly recent.

Check Cheri's guide, since she has a lot of advice on team building and what dps you could focus on. Just from checking your current options, I would suggest for dtide:

- Vortice/Murphy/Celeste/Ramona
- Sanga/Saya/Thais/Faint
- if you pull Arachne, Caecus/Arachne/Winkle/Horla
- borrowed whale Mouchette/Aigis/Leigh/Helot (once you get her)

You should try to get more standard awakeners to have more options available, plus think what dps you will enjoy more (Cheri's guide has a dps tier list for new players and recommendations for every awakener's teammates).

For story, Vortice/Murphy/Celeste/flex (Sanga, Thais, Saya) will serve you better than what you are currently running. Just make sure to get Vortice's posse from her side story (costs 3 reality verges).

content: I'm not knowledgeable about GHelot, but anything with Arachne will stomp (she bypasses a lot of mechanics and immunity buffs with her execute). Outside of Arachne, Vortice/Tawil/Hameln/Celeste or Vortice/Celeste/Murphy/flex (GMurphy, Saya) will work (I've played them myself). I haven't tried Caecus/Arachne in story mode, but they also work really well together, something like Caecus/Arachne/Horla/Castor should also work really well for a more tanky approach

thread_title: LF Help for Optimal Team Building for D-Tide with my current team

content:
check cheri's guide, she has a section on team building, how to approach dtide (the mode that requires you to build multiple teams) and explanations for awakeners and suggested teammates.

With what you have, making a team around Gelot, one around Vortice and another around Saya+a exalt dps like Sanga would be a pretty straightforward path. Afterwards, decide whether you want a 4th team around a main dps (Kath, Sorel, Daffodil) or around a mechanic (Arachne + poison with Xu/Nymph, or with counter with Caecus/Wanda). Fifth team should be leftover supports and a whaled dps.

thread_title: [Newcomer Help] Team Advice

content:
These are all the characters I currently own.

I'm really enjoying the Tentacle archetype, so I'd like to keep building around it.
That said, I'm not sure whether a Poison/Tentacle team would perform better than a Counter/Tentacle team.
Or maybe only the tentacle archetype it's better ?

Based on my roster, which characters would you keep, and which ones would you swap out? 
I'd also appreciate any explanation behind your choices so I can better understand the team-building logic.

Thanks! 😊
thread_title: [Newcomer Help] Team Advice

content:
Goliath is usually used as a support for the lemurian team (GMurphy/Myriam/Goliath/Tulu or Faros), but it is not newbie friendly investment wise or even good for arc1 story content. I haven't tried this myself, but a Goliath/Saya team with him as a dps should work too (use Saya's 0 cost and stack as much tentacle damage and strength as possible before exalting Goliath for usurp). I'm just unsure how much investment and support it would need to make it a5 worthy. For this specific query, I suggest you ask in team building.

I will also say that the enlightments on your main dps are quite lacking. Try to get Mouchette to e2 or Gelot to e3 if you are planning on bringing them to higher alerts. On lower alerts you can kinda do whatever and it works. Make sure to read Cheri's guide's section about dtide, since she talks about it (and the awakener guides section to get suggestions on synergies).

With all that said, and assuming you'll end up getting your missing standard units from the standard banner, I would consider Gelot/Thais/Aigis/Helot, Mouchette/Ramona/Faint/flex, an exalt dps coupled with Saya (like the Goliath team I mentioned or, better yet, Sanga and supports that help her shield and survive like Faros, Caecus or Celeste) and a poison team (Liz/Lily/Arachne/Clem if you pull her tmr), with a whale Mouch with whatever as the 5th team.

Once again, temper your expectations for dtide because you are missing quite a few dupes on your current dps (and some of the suggested teams I gave might not perform well enough because of that). It takes time to get to higher alerts as a new player , and clearing a2 already gives the pulls anyway
thread_title: D-Tide Team Help

content: as for gnostic potential, please please ignore it. It is not worth to use hundreds on pulls on 10% stats on a single character when those pulls can be invested into getting standard characters to +12 or arc 1 limited awakeners. Get Faint from the Caro banner and any character you are missing that you might like, get the blade of the titan wheel (goliath's wheel) to +12 and then pick a realm that you wish to play their standards the most to +12 all of them.

thread_title: D-Tide Team Help

content:
you can start working towards covenants if you want, just learn what main stats to pick and what covenants to prioritize first though. They're not mandatory to raise early in arc 1 though.

Just progress through the story at your own pace, both normal and hard mode. I usually clear hard mode stages 1-2 chapters behind normal mode, but that's my preference. Spend energy on a max lvl event stage (the Saya event, you don't need to redo the fight beyond the first clear to spend energy) or getting the covenants pieces with the main stats you need.
